title: Medtronic India Ventures Solutions is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Medtronic India Ventures Solutions is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Consultant Physician looking for your next big career move? Medtronic India Ventures Solutions in Faridabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Medtronic India Ventures Solutions:
Medtronic India Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Learning & development budget
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Medtronic India Ventures Solutions!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
